title_en: Block's Managerbot: Proactive AI Agent for Square Businesses
summary_en: Square's new AI agent proactively monitors businesses, identifies problems, and proposes solutions without being asked. This represents the clearest proof of AI agents driving real business value.

title_en: LLM Traffic Converts 30-40% Higher Than Traditional Search
summary_en: AI-referred traffic converts at dramatically higher rates than traditional search. Most enterprises aren't optimizing for answer engine optimization (AEO) yet.

title_en: GLM 5.1 Open Source AI Beats GPT-5 on Coding
summary_en: Chinese startup releases GLM-5.1 under MIT license, outperforming GPT-5 on coding benchmarks. Works autonomously for 8-hour shifts with commercial use allowed.

title_en: Astropad Workbench: Remote Control for AI Agents
summary_en: New tool lets users remotely monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from mobile devices. Designed for AI workflow management, not traditional IT support.

title_en: Amazon S3 Files: Native Workspace for AI Agents
summary_en: AWS launches file system layer for AI agents to access S3 data naturally. Eliminates need for separate file systems and duplicate data pipelines.

title_en: Atlassian Confluence Adds Visual AI and Third-Party Agents
summary_en: Confluence now includes visual asset creation tools and integrates agents from Lovable, Replit, and Gamma. Expands AI capabilities beyond text to visual content.

title_en: Google's Offline AI Dictation App Competes with Wispr
summary_en: Google quietly releases offline dictation app using Gemma AI models. Works without internet connection, challenging apps like Wispr Flow.

title_en: MassMutual Achieves 30% Developer Productivity Gains with AI
summary_en: Enterprise case study shows concrete AI results: 30% productivity gains, IT resolution times from 11 minutes to 1. Explains how to avoid pilot sprawl.

title_en: Gradient Labs: AI Account Managers for Every Bank Customer
summary_en: Banking startup uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 to power AI agents that automate support workflows. Provides personalized account management at scale.

title_en: OpenAI Raises $122 Billion for Global AI Expansion
summary_en: Massive funding round targets frontier AI expansion, next-generation compute investment, and meeting growing demand for enterprise AI services.

title_en: OpenAI Codex Gets Flexible Pay-As-You-Go Pricing
summary_en: Codex now offers pay-as-you-go options for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise teams. Provides more flexible adoption and scaling for businesses.

title_en: GEO Best Practices: Don't Chase Prompt Volume
summary_en: Generative engine optimization guide warns against focusing on prompt volume. Data is largely estimated; focus on quality optimization instead.

title_en: How to Use AI in Your Graphic Design Process
summary_en: Practical guide to integrating AI tools into design workflows without replacing creativity. AI now lives inside Figma, Adobe, and most product workflows.

title_en: Voice Search Ads Transform Google Search Reports in 2026
summary_en: Google Ads Search Term Reports now show conversational queries instead of keywords. Voice search is fundamentally changing how people interact with ads.

title_en: KiloClaw Tackles Shadow AI with Agent Governance
summary_en: New enterprise tool enforces governance over autonomous agents and manages shadow AI deployments. Addresses employees bypassing official AI procurement.

title_en: Microsoft Open-Source Toolkit Secures AI Agents
summary_en: Microsoft releases open-source runtime security toolkit for enterprise AI agents. Forces strict governance on autonomous models executing code and accessing networks.

title_en: Anthropic's Dangerous Cyber AI Powers Project Glasswing
summary_en: Anthropic's unreleased Claude Mythos model deemed too dangerous for public release. Partners with 12 major companies to find infrastructure vulnerabilities.

title_en: AI Models Score 0.37% on True Intelligence Test
summary_en: While Jensen Huang claims AGI achieved, ARC-AGI-3 benchmark shows AI scores 0.37% vs humans' 100%. Current AI can't adapt to true novelty.

title_en: North Korea Compromises NPM, Iran Targets AI Centers
summary_en: Major security breaches target AI infrastructure: North Korea infiltrates npm packages, Iran publishes OpenAI data center coordinates. New threat landscape emerging.

title_en: Databricks Co-Founder Wins ACM Award, Claims AGI Exists
summary_en: Matei Zaharia receives top computing honor, argues AGI already exists but is misunderstood. Now focusing AI research on scientific applications.
